commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
import pandas as pd
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier
import joblib

df = pd.read_csv("training_data.csv")

# Converteer target
df["prognose10jaar"] = df["prognose10jaar"].map({"CHD+": 1, "CHD-": 0})

# Train/test split
train_df, test_df = train_test_split(
    df,
    test_size=0.10,
    random_state=42,
    stratify=df["prognose10jaar"]
)

# Features/labels
X_train = train_df.drop(columns=["prognose10jaar", "Individu-ID"])
y_train = train_df["prognose10jaar"]

# Train model
model = RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=200, random_state=42)
model.fit(X_train, y_train)

# Save model
joblib.dump(model, "model.pkl")

print("Model opgeslagen als model.pkl")
